news.t: US FDA to monitor clinical trial data in real time in pilot program aimed at speeding approvals

holdings.infoBox: PIE is an equity ETF with a total of 111 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marketech International stock at 3.88%, Accton Technology at 3.85%, United Integrated Services at 3.27%, Topco Scientific at 3.17%, and Sigurd Microelectronics at 3.02%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Emerging Markets Momentum ETF (PIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of stocks in emerging markets that show high relative strength characteristics. PIE was launched on Dec 28, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.

data.text: The U.S. ​Food and Drug Administration launched a pilot program on Monday aimed at allowing the ‌agency to monitor clinical trial data in real time, a step the agency said could cut years from drug ap...
